description: This domain facilitates obtaining document snapshots with DOM, layout, and style information.

types.description: A Node in the DOM tree.

properties.name: nodeType
properties.description: `Node`'s nodeType.

properties.name: nodeName
properties.description: `Node`'s nodeName.

properties.name: nodeValue
properties.description: `Node`'s nodeValue.

properties.name: textValue
properties.description: Only set for textarea elements, contains the text value.

properties.name: inputValue
properties.description: Only set for input elements, contains the input's associated text value.

properties.name: inputChecked
properties.description: Only set for radio and checkbox input elements, indicates if the element has been checked

properties.name: optionSelected
properties.description: Only set for option elements, indicates if the element has been selected

properties.name: backendNodeId
properties.description: `Node`'s id, corresponds to DOM.Node.backendNodeId.

properties.name: childNodeIndexes
properties.description:
The indexes of the node's child nodes in the `domNodes` array returned by `getSnapshot`, if
any.

properties.name: attributes
properties.description: Attributes of an `Element` node.

properties.name: pseudoElementIndexes
properties.description:
Indexes of pseudo elements associated with this node in the `domNodes` array returned by
`getSnapshot`, if any.

properties.name: layoutNodeIndex
properties.description:
The index of the node's related layout tree node in the `layoutTreeNodes` array returned by
`getSnapshot`, if any.

properties.name: documentURL
properties.description: Document URL that `Document` or `FrameOwner` node points to.

properties.name: baseURL
properties.description: Base URL that `Document` or `FrameOwner` node uses for URL completion.

properties.name: contentLanguage
properties.description: Only set for documents, contains the document's content language.

properties.name: documentEncoding
properties.description: Only set for documents, contains the document's character set encoding.

properties.name: publicId
properties.description: `DocumentType` node's publicId.

properties.name: systemId
properties.description: `DocumentType` node's systemId.

properties.name: frameId
properties.description: Frame ID for frame owner elements and also for the document node.

properties.name: contentDocumentIndex
properties.description:
The index of a frame owner element's content document in the `domNodes` array returned by
`getSnapshot`, if any.

properties.name: pseudoType
properties.description: Type of a pseudo element node.

properties.name: shadowRootType
properties.description: Shadow root type.

properties.name: isClickable
properties.description:
Whether this DOM node responds to mouse clicks. This includes nodes that have had click
event listeners attached via JavaScript as well as anchor tags that naturally navigate when
clicked.

properties.name: eventListeners
properties.description: Details of the node's event listeners, if any.

properties.name: currentSourceURL
properties.description: The selected url for nodes with a srcset attribute.

properties.name: originURL
properties.description: The url of the script (if any) that generates this node.

properties.name: scrollOffsetX
properties.description: Scroll offsets, set when this node is a Document.

types.description:
Details of post layout rendered text positions. The exact layout should not be regarded as
stable and may change between versions.

properties.name: boundingBox
properties.description: The bounding box in document coordinates. Note that scroll offset of the document is ignored.

properties.name: startCharacterIndex
properties.description:
The starting index in characters, for this post layout textbox substring. Characters that
would be represented as a surrogate pair in UTF-16 have length 2.

properties.name: numCharacters
properties.description:
The number of characters in this post layout textbox substring. Characters that would be
represented as a surrogate pair in UTF-16 have length 2.

types.description: Details of an element in the DOM tree with a LayoutObject.

properties.name: domNodeIndex
properties.description: The index of the related DOM node in the `domNodes` array returned by `getSnapshot`.

properties.name: boundingBox
properties.description: The bounding box in document coordinates. Note that scroll offset of the document is ignored.

properties.name: layoutText
properties.description: Contents of the LayoutText, if any.

properties.name: inlineTextNodes
properties.description: The post-layout inline text nodes, if any.

properties.name: styleIndex
properties.description: Index into the `computedStyles` array returned by `getSnapshot`.

properties.name: paintOrder
properties.description:
Global paint order index, which is determined by the stacking order of the nodes. Nodes
that are painted together will have the same index. Only provided if includePaintOrder in
getSnapshot was true.

properties.name: isStackingContext
properties.description: Set to true to indicate the element begins a new stacking context.

types.description: A subset of the full ComputedStyle as defined by the request whitelist.

properties.name: properties
properties.description: Name/value pairs of computed style properties.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Attribute/property name.

properties.name: value
properties.description: Attribute/property value.

types.description: Index of the string in the strings table.
Index of the string in the strings table.
Data that is only present on rare nodes.

properties.name: documentURL
properties.description: Document URL that `Document` or `FrameOwner` node points to.

properties.name: title
properties.description: Document title.

properties.name: baseURL
properties.description: Base URL that `Document` or `FrameOwner` node uses for URL completion.

properties.name: contentLanguage
properties.description: Contains the document's content language.

properties.name: encodingName
properties.description: Contains the document's character set encoding.

properties.name: publicId
properties.description: `DocumentType` node's publicId.

properties.name: systemId
properties.description: `DocumentType` node's systemId.

properties.name: frameId
properties.description: Frame ID for frame owner elements and also for the document node.

properties.name: nodes
properties.description: A table with dom nodes.

properties.name: layout
properties.description: The nodes in the layout tree.

properties.name: textBoxes
properties.description: The post-layout inline text nodes.

properties.name: scrollOffsetX
properties.description: Horizontal scroll offset.

properties.name: scrollOffsetY
properties.description: Vertical scroll offset.

properties.name: contentWidth
properties.description: Document content width.

properties.name: contentHeight
properties.description: Document content height.

properties.name: parentIndex
properties.description: Parent node index.

properties.name: nodeType
properties.description: `Node`'s nodeType.

properties.name: shadowRootType
properties.description: Type of the shadow root the `Node` is in. String values are equal to the `ShadowRootType` enum.

properties.name: nodeName
properties.description: `Node`'s nodeName.

properties.name: nodeValue
properties.description: `Node`'s nodeValue.

properties.name: backendNodeId
properties.description: `Node`'s id, corresponds to DOM.Node.backendNodeId.

properties.name: attributes
properties.description: Attributes of an `Element` node. Flatten name, value pairs.

properties.name: textValue
properties.description: Only set for textarea elements, contains the text value.

properties.name: inputValue
properties.description: Only set for input elements, contains the input's associated text value.

properties.name: inputChecked
properties.description: Only set for radio and checkbox input elements, indicates if the element has been checked

properties.name: optionSelected
properties.description: Only set for option elements, indicates if the element has been selected

properties.name: contentDocumentIndex
properties.description: The index of the document in the list of the snapshot documents.

properties.name: pseudoType
properties.description: Type of a pseudo element node.

properties.name: pseudoIdentifier
properties.description:
Pseudo element identifier for this node. Only present if there is a
valid pseudoType.

properties.name: isClickable
properties.description:
Whether this DOM node responds to mouse clicks. This includes nodes that have had click
event listeners attached via JavaScript as well as anchor tags that naturally navigate when
clicked.

properties.name: currentSourceURL
properties.description: The selected url for nodes with a srcset attribute.

properties.name: originURL
properties.description: The url of the script (if any) that generates this node.

types.description: Table of details of an element in the DOM tree with a LayoutObject.

properties.name: nodeIndex
properties.description: Index of the corresponding node in the `NodeTreeSnapshot` array returned by `captureSnapshot`.

properties.name: styles
properties.description: Array of indexes specifying computed style strings, filtered according to the `computedStyles` parameter passed to `captureSnapshot`.

properties.name: bounds
properties.description: The absolute position bounding box.

properties.name: text
properties.description: Contents of the LayoutText, if any.

properties.name: stackingContexts
properties.description: Stacking context information.

properties.name: paintOrders
properties.description:
Global paint order index, which is determined by the stacking order of the nodes. Nodes
that are painted together will have the same index. Only provided if includePaintOrder in
captureSnapshot was true.

properties.name: offsetRects
properties.description: The offset rect of nodes. Only available when includeDOMRects is set to true

properties.name: scrollRects
properties.description: The scroll rect of nodes. Only available when includeDOMRects is set to true

properties.name: clientRects
properties.description: The client rect of nodes. Only available when includeDOMRects is set to true

properties.name: blendedBackgroundColors
properties.description: The list of background colors that are blended with colors of overlapping elements.

properties.name: textColorOpacities
properties.description: The list of computed text opacities.

types.description:
Table of details of the post layout rendered text positions. The exact layout should not be regarded as
stable and may change between versions.

properties.name: layoutIndex
properties.description: Index of the layout tree node that owns this box collection.

properties.name: bounds
properties.description: The absolute position bounding box.

properties.name: start
properties.description:
The starting index in characters, for this post layout textbox substring. Characters that
would be represented as a surrogate pair in UTF-16 have length 2.

properties.name: length
properties.description:
The number of characters in this post layout textbox substring. Characters that would be
represented as a surrogate pair in UTF-16 have length 2.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables DOM snapshot agent for the given page.

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enables DOM snapshot agent for the given page.

commands.name: getSnapshot
commands.description:
Returns a document snapshot, including the full DOM tree of the root node (including iframes,
template contents, and imported documents) in a flattened array, as well as layout and
white-listed computed style information for the nodes. Shadow DOM in the returned DOM tree is
flattened.

parameters.name: computedStyleWhitelist
parameters.description: Whitelist of computed styles to return.

parameters.name: includeEventListeners
parameters.description: Whether or not to retrieve details of DOM listeners (default false).

parameters.name: includePaintOrder
parameters.description: Whether to determine and include the paint order index of LayoutTreeNodes (default false).

parameters.name: includeUserAgentShadowTree
parameters.description: Whether to include UA shadow tree in the snapshot (default false).

returns.name: domNodes
returns.description: The nodes in the DOM tree. The DOMNode at index 0 corresponds to the root document.

returns.name: layoutTreeNodes
returns.description: The nodes in the layout tree.

returns.name: computedStyles
returns.description: Whitelisted ComputedStyle properties for each node in the layout tree.

commands.name: captureSnapshot
commands.description:
Returns a document snapshot, including the full DOM tree of the root node (including iframes,
template contents, and imported documents) in a flattened array, as well as layout and
white-listed computed style information for the nodes. Shadow DOM in the returned DOM tree is
flattened.

parameters.name: computedStyles
parameters.description: Whitelist of computed styles to return.

parameters.name: includePaintOrder
parameters.description: Whether to include layout object paint orders into the snapshot.

parameters.name: includeDOMRects
parameters.description: Whether to include DOM rectangles (offsetRects, clientRects, scrollRects) into the snapshot

parameters.name: includeBlendedBackgroundColors
parameters.description:
Whether to include blended background colors in the snapshot (default: false).
Blended background color is achieved by blending background colors of all elements
that overlap with the current element.

parameters.name: includeTextColorOpacities
parameters.description:
Whether to include text color opacity in the snapshot (default: false).
An element might have the opacity property set that affects the text color of the element.
The final text color opacity is computed based on the opacity of all overlapping elements.

returns.name: documents
returns.description: The nodes in the DOM tree. The DOMNode at index 0 corresponds to the root document.

returns.name: strings
returns.description: Shared string table that all string properties refer to with indexes.
